帮我分析aisuite的模块的代码逻辑，输出到docs的md文件

input.prompt:
I need a very thorough exploration of the "aisuite" module in this project. Find all files related to aisuite - including Go source files, test files, config files, CRD definitions, controllers, etc. Search across the entire repository for anything related to "aisuite" or "AISuite". 

For each file found, I need:
1. The full file path
2. A summary of what the file contains (key types, functions, interfaces)
3. How it relates to other aisuite files

Also look for:
- API types / CRD definitions
- Controllers
- Services/business logic
- Utilities/helpers
- Tests
- Helm charts or deployment configs related to aisuite

Be very thorough - check pkg/, internal/, api/, controllers/, cmd/, config/, charts/, deploy/ and any other directories.

message.content: 帮我分析aisuite的模块的代码逻辑，输出到docs的md文件

input.description: Find all files under aisuite directories

content.content:
1	package aisuite
2	
3	import (
4		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/backend/cluster/manager"
5		"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
6		"gorm.io/gorm"
7	)
8	
9	// RegisterHandlers 注册AISuite模块的路由
10	func RegisterHandlers(root *gin.RouterGroup, db *gorm.DB, apiserverGetter manager.ApiserverGetter) error {
11		server, err := newServer(db, apiserverGetter)
12		if err != nil {
13			return err
14		}
15	
16		// List所有AISuites
17		root.GET("/aisuites", server.ListAISuites)
18		// Get某个AISuite的详情
19		root.GET("/aisuites/:name", server.GetAISuite)
20		// Get某个AISuite的README内容
21		root.GET("/aisuites/:name/readme", server.GetAISuiteReadme)
22		// 部署/更新/卸载AISuite
23		root.POST("/aisuites/:name", server.OperateAISuiteInCluster)
24		return nil
25	
26	}
27

2	
3	import (
4		"context"
5		"encoding/json"
6		"fmt"
7		"sort"
8		"strings"
9		"sync"
10		"time"
11	
12		"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
13		"github.com/mittwald/goharbor-client/v5/apiv2/model"
14		"gorm.io/gorm"
15	
16		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/backend/cluster/manager"
17		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/db"
18		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/harbor"
19		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/log"
20		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/models/aisuite"
21		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/models/helm"
22		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/oras"
23		"code.srdcloud.cn/TDP-PaaS/TDP-CODE/paas-controller/pkg/util"
24	)
25	
26	type Controller struct {
27		db              *gorm.DB
28		apiserverGetter manager.ApiserverGetter
29	
30		schemaCache sync.Map // key: "name@digest" -> []byte
31		readmeCache sync.Map // key: "name:chartVersion" -> string
32	
33		registryCacheMu      sync.RWMutex
34		registrySuitesCache  []*aisuite.ProfileAISuite
35		registrySuitesExpire time.Time
36	
37		catalogSyncMu    sync.Mutex
38		catalogLastSync  time.Time
39		catalogSyncError error
40	}
41	
42	const (
43		suiteProjectPrefix  = "zzzz_internal_ai_suite"
44		suiteChartProject   = suiteProjectPrefix + "_helm_charts"
45		chartArtifactType   = "CHART"
46		jsonSchemaFileName  = "tap_aisuite_values.json"
47		readmeFileName      = "README.md"
48		aisuiteReleaseLabel = "DeployedBy=TAPAISuite"
49		maxSchemaSize       = 1024 * 1024 // 单位：字节
50		wait                = true
51		waitTimeout         = 10 * time.Minute
52		helmParamPrefix     = "tap_aisuite_"
53		registryCacheTTL    = 3 * time.Minute
54		catalogSyncInterval = 5 * time.Minute
55	)
56	
57	const (
58		deployStatusUndeployed = "undeployed"
59	)
60	
61	const (
62		ActionInstall   = "install"
63		ActionUpgrade   = "upgrade"
64		ActionUninstall = "uninstall"
65	)
66	
67	const (
68		optimisticPendingInstall   = "pending-install"
69		optimisticPendingUpgrade   = "pending-upgrade"
70		optimisticPendingUninstall = "pending-uninstall"
71	)
72	
73	func NewController(db *gorm.DB, apiserverGetter manager.ApiserverGetter) (*Controller, error) {
74		return &Controller{
75			db:              db,
76			apiserverGetter: apiserverGetter,
77		}, nil
78	}
79	
80	func (c *Controller) ListAISuites(ctx *gin.Context, clusterCode string) (*aisuite.ListAISuitesResp, error) {
81		suiteRegistry, err := getSuiteRegistry(c.db)
82		var aiSuitesInRegistry []*aisuite.ProfileAISuite
83		if err != nil {
84			log.Errorf("failed to get suite registry: %v", err)
85		} else {
86			aiSuitesInRegistry, err = c.listAISuitesInRegistry(ctx, suiteRegistry)
87			if err != nil {
88				log.Errorf("failed to list AI Suites in registry: %v", err)
89			}
90		}
91	
92		aiSuitesInCluster, err := c.listAISuitesInCluster(clusterCode)
93		// 如果查询集群内套件失败，应该直接返回报错，防止用户下一步操作部署一个已经在集群里部署了的套件（因为用户看不到集群里的套件列表，以为没有，所以又部署了一个）
94		if err != nil {
95			log.Errorf("failed to list AI Suites in cluster: %v", err)
96			return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to list AI Suites in cluster: %w", err)
97		}
98	
99		aiSuites := mergeAiSuites(aiSuitesInRegistry, aiSuitesInCluster)
100		sort.Slice(aiSuites, func(i, j int) bool {
101			return aiSuites[i].Name < aiSuites[j].Name
102		})
103	
104		return &aisuite.ListAISuitesResp{
105			Total: len(aiSuites),
106			Data:  aiSuites,
107		}, nil
108	}
109	
110	func (c *Controller) GetAISuite(ctx *gin.Context, clusterCode, name, chartVersion, namespace string) (*aisuite.GetAISuiteResp, error) {
111		// 从集群和registry中查询套件
112		suiteInCluster, err := c.getAISuiteInCluster(clusterCode, name, chartVersion, namespace)
113		if err != nil {
114			log.Errorf("encountered error while getting AI Suite in cluster: %v", err)
115			if namespace != "" {
116				return nil, fmt.Errorf("encountered error while getting AI Suite in cluster: %w", err)
117			}
118		}
119	
120		suiteInRegistry := new(aisuite.GetAISuiteResp)
121		suiteRegistry, err := getSuiteRegistry(c.db)
122		if err != nil {
123			log.Errorf("failed to get suite registry: %v", err)
124		} else {
125			suiteInRegistry, err = c.getAISuiteInRegistry(ctx, suiteRegistry, name, chartVersion)
126			if err != nil {
127				log.Errorf("encountered error while getting AI Suite in registry: %v", err)
128				suiteInRegistry = nil
129			}
130		}
131	
132		switch {
133		case suiteInCluster == nil && suiteInRegistry == nil:
134			return nil, fmt.Errorf("AI Suite %s not found in both cluster and registry", name)
135		case suiteInCluster != nil && suiteInRegistry == nil:
136			return suiteInCluster, nil
137		case suiteInCluster == nil && suiteInRegistry != nil:
138			return suiteInRegistry, nil
139		case suiteInCluster != nil && suiteInRegistry != nil:
140			if suiteInCluster.ProfileAISuite != nil && suiteInCluster.ProfileAISuite.Version != nil {
141				inBoth := false
142				for _, version := range suiteInRegistry.VersionList {
143					if version.DisplayVersion == suiteInCluster.ProfileAISuite.Version.DisplayVersion {
144						suiteInCluster.VersionList = suiteInRegistry.VersionList
145						inBoth = true
146						break
147					}
148				}
149				if !inBoth {
150					suiteInCluster.VersionList = append(suiteInCluster.VersionList, suiteInCluster.ProfileAISuite.Version)
